projects.title: AutoFACS CV/ML
projects.summary: A computer-vision project focused on emotion recognition and facial analysis using FACS-based coding, with emphasis on training discipline, evaluation, and deployment-aware inference workflows.

projects.title: AutoFACS CLI Automation
projects.summary: A separate automation track focused on prompt-governed CLI workflows, audit boundaries, and operational control for AI and MLOps systems.

projects.title: LED Pomodoro Timer
projects.summary: A silent custom Arduino Mega Pomodoro timer with 30 high-visibility LEDs, dual focus/break controls, and a custom LightBurn enclosure.

projects.title: Казкар
projects.summary: A simple three-button audio player built on Arduino Uno and housed in a custom LightBurn-designed case, created so children can listen to audiobooks without the distractions of a screen or extra interface clutter.
